site.name: OSONDEV
site.description: OsonDev is an independent studio designing and engineering refined digital products for ambitious teams.

hero.title: Complex ideas.
hero.description: Strategy, product design, and engineering in one focused team — from the first system map to a production-ready release.

work.heading: Selected work
work.intro: A small set of recent engagements — each one pushed for clarity, performance, and a product-level finish. Detail over volume.

services.heading: Services
services.intro: Full-cycle development for founders and teams who care about craft — from first wireframe through launch and the iterations that follow.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Marketing websites and product interfaces built on a modern tech stack — focused on high performance, reliability, and seamless scalability

items.title: UI/UX Design
items.description: Designing interfaces and scalable design systems: from deep user research to polished, pixel-perfect UI

items.title: SaaS Development
items.description: Engineering complex B2B platforms: from analytical dashboards and onboarding flows to flexible billing integrations

items.title: Performance Optimization
items.description: Core Web Vitals optimization, infrastructure audits, and bundle cleaning to achieve instant load times and flawless speed

items.title: Motion & Interaction Design
items.description: Restrained motion systems and micro-interactions that guide attention without spectacle.

process.heading: Process
process.intro: A clear sequence with room for craft — tight feedback loops, no black boxes, and decisions you can trace back to research.

cta.heading: Have a project in mind?
cta.description: Tell us briefly what you need to launch or improve. We’ll review the brief and reply with a clear next step.
